stemHtml:
Which of the following statements are true for a thermal circuit breaker? Circuit breakers...

1. Can be reset once if tripped, if the captain deems it is necessary for the safe continuation of the flight
2. Can be used to reset aircraft systems, if it is according to a described procedure
3. Can be used to switch systems on and off on modern fly-by-wire aircraft without issue
4. Can be reset twice to restore electrical power to a system provided an entry is made in the technical log
